title: IFOYO Squeaky Chew Toy for Dogs - Mini Sneaker Puppy Toy with Safe and Durable Design, for Small/Medium Dogs & Cats
features: Bright colors, stimulating pets to love it, reducing damage to furniture and shoes
Squeaky Dog Toy, Makes a squeaky sound when being squeezed, A great toy to keep your pet active
Bite Resistant, suitable for for Puppy, Small Medium Dogs, Birds, Cats, Ferrets, Rabbits, Guinea Pigs and Small Animals
A good pet companion to kill time with, your dog's favorite taste, Both interesting when play alone and play interactively. Have fun anytime, anywhere
Great gift idea for coming holiday season like Easter, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Children's Day, Valentine's Day, Weddings, Thanks Giving, Christmas and etc
description: Product Description Product description This tiger pet shoe is used for your interaction with your pet, you can use this product to tug of war and hide and seek with them. This is a good way to consume their energy and reduce their boredom. Description: Lovely tiger model, Can stimulate the vitality of dogs and attract their attention, thereby reducing damage to other household products. Appropriate size, the size of 23 x 13 x 14 cm.(L*W*H)/9.1 x 5.1 x 5.5 inch(L*W*H) is very suitable for dogs to chew. Make the dog more focused, The squeaking balls inside will excite the curiosity of the dogs, exercise their brains, and make them more active and cute. Machine washable, making it easier to clean, and making your dog cleaner when using it. Feature: Color: Yellow, Brown and White Size: 23 x 13 x 14 cm.(L*W*H)/9.1 x 5.1 x 5.5 inch(L*W*H) Package Including: 1 x Tiger Pet Shoe
